title_or_headline: Gear access shapes the beginner funnel

title_or_headline: Learning loops and teacher trust transfer selectively
summary: General learning mechanics can inspire Yousician, and teacher/institution signals can shape credibility, but guitar research should stay anchored in practice, feedback, songs, confidence, and free-time constraints.

title_or_headline: AI should reduce guidance and practice friction
